meaning: adj.(农作物)出苗后至成熟前的 苗期使用(或发生)的
examples: Adjuvants increase postemergence herbicide efficacy, but adjuvant type greatly affects herbicide efficacy enhancement by the adjuvant.
Compounds were sprayed immediately after seed planting (preemergence treatment) or after the expansion of the first true leaf (postemergence treatment).
